summary.lv: Ubiquiti meklē Senior Back-End inženieru ar Node.js/TypeScript un PostgreSQL pieredzi, kurš vadīs arhitektūras diskusijas un izstrādās drošas, mērogojamas API globāliem produktiem.
summary.en: Ubiquiti seeks a Senior Back-End Engineer with Node.js/TypeScript and PostgreSQL expertise to lead architecture discussions and build secure, scalable APIs for products used by millions globally.
